label: 2026-04-17-chilled-lane
description: Same opening as the no-control replay, but it adds an early Frost Fern in lane 2 ahead of the center Thorn. Expected to CLEAR because the chilled lane turns Frost Fern into the required control lever for the central ram/sniper pressure window.

placements.note: Open with a center Thorn so the first lane-2 beetles are already under fire.
Early bank away from the center sniper lane so the first pulses arrive before wave 2.
Catch the first lane-1 Shard Mite before it slips past the wall column.
Mirror the lane-1 answer for the lane-3 Shard Mite.
Front-lane Frost Fern added during wave 1 so lane-2 rams and snipers arrive chilled in front of the center guns.
Backfill the top lane before the late wave-1 Shard Mite can cross the wall tile.
Screen the lane-4 Sunroot before the wave-2 sniper can take it.
Center-lane piercing follow-up behind the chilled zone for the scripted ram waves.
